items.title: Apple’s MacBook Neo is winning over a new generation of buyers
items.summary: The MacBook Neo shipped 1.1 million units in its first weeks on sale, IDC estimates, as Apple pushes deeper into the mainstream laptop market.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: When every minute counts: How the PM RAHAT scheme is transforming emergency care in India
